name: Education / What to Study
use_cases: A student unsure whether to study Medicine, Law, or Tech
Someone who chose a course but feels it’s the wrong path
A graduate confused about next steps (Masters, skill, or work)
A young person pressured by family to study something they don’t want
Someone seeking God’s direction before choosing a field

name: Navigating Relationships (Friendship, Family, Church, Business)
use_cases: Someone unsure if they should continue or end a relationship
A person struggling with toxic friendships
A couple facing constant misunderstandings
A Christian navigating dating intentionally for marriage
Business partners dealing with conflict or trust issues
Conflict among genuine christians

name: Relationship with God / Faith / Spirituality
use_cases: Someone who feels distant from God
A believer struggling with consistency in prayer or devotion
A new Christian trying to grow spiritually
Someone dealing with doubt or confusion about faith or religion
A person seeking to hear God’s direction clearly

name: Finance / Career / Business
use_cases: Someone confused about career direction
A professional feeling stuck or unfulfilled at work
An entrepreneur unsure how to build or grow a business
Someone struggling with financial discipline or debt
A believer trying to align career decisions with God’s will

name: Depression and Mental Health
use_cases: Someone dealing with persistent sadness or emptiness
A person feeling overwhelmed and mentally drained
Someone struggling with anxiety about life or the future
A believer questioning why they feel this way despite faith
Someone needing support, encouragement, and structure

name: My Life Purpose
use_cases: Someone asking: What am I really meant to do?
A person feeling lost despite being active or busy
Someone who wants to align their life with God’s calling
A professional questioning if they are in the right path
Someone seeking clarity on purpose and direction

name: Self-Esteem and Self-Worth
use_cases: Someone who constantly feels not good enough
A person comparing themselves to others
Someone dealing with rejection or failure
A believer struggling to understand their identity in Christ
Someone lacking confidence to step into opportunities

name: Family Issues
use_cases: Conflict between parents and children
Someone dealing with a difficult or controlling parent
Sibling conflicts or long-standing tension
A person navigating family expectations vs personal calling
Someone dealing with family instability or pressure

name: Habits and Addictions
use_cases: Struggling with pornography
Social media or phone addiction
Lack of discipline in daily routines
Procrastination affecting growth
Repeated patterns they want to break but can’t

name: Sex
use_cases: A Christian struggling with sexual purity
Someone dealing with sexual temptation
Confusion around boundaries in relationships
Someone seeking healing from past sexual experiences
Questions about sex within a godly framework

name: Understanding Womanhood
use_cases: A young woman trying to understand her identity and role
Navigating femininity in a modern world
Preparing for marriage and future family life
Dealing with societal pressure vs godly values
Understanding purpose as a woman in Christ

name: Understanding Manhood
use_cases: A young man trying to understand what it means to be a man
Struggling with responsibility, discipline, and leadership
Preparing for marriage and provision
Overcoming passivity or confusion about direction
Aligning masculinity with godly principles

name: Trauma and Unforgiveness
use_cases: A victim of abuse (physical, emotional, or sexual)
Someone hurt deeply by family or close relationships
Betrayal from a friend or partner
Struggling to forgive someone who caused serious pain
Carrying resentment, anger, or past wounds

name: Marriage, Dating and Courtship
use_cases: Someone unsure if they should enter or commit to a relationship
A person questioning if their current partner is right for marriage
Struggling with boundaries in a dating relationship
A couple facing recurring misunderstandings or conflict
Someone preparing intentionally for marriage but unsure where to start
A person dealing with pressure to get married from family or society
Someone recovering from a breakup and seeking clarity moving forward
A believer trying to date in a way that aligns with their faith
Engaged couples seeking guidance before marriage
Someone dealing with red flags but unsure whether to stay or leave
A person struggling with emotional attachment or dependency in relationships
Someone seeking healing from past relationship experiences before dating again
